Class JavaSourceGroup

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.components.ProjectNode
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.components.JavaSourceGroup
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class JavaSourceGroup extends ProjectNode
A specialized container for a Java source group (e.g., src/main/java).

This class performs a deep scan of the Java source root, resolving logical types into a hierarchical package-centric view. It performs a hybrid scan, merging logical type information from the index with a physical filesystem walk to ensure 'package-info.java' and other non-indexed files are included.

Author:
Anahata

  • Field Details

    • name

  • Constructor Details

    • JavaSourceGroup

      public JavaSourceGroup(org.netbeans.api.project.Project project, org.netbeans.api.project.SourceGroup sg) throws Exception
      Constructs and populates the Java source group logic using a hybrid approach.

      Implementation details: 1. Queries the NetBeans ClassIndex for all declared types in the group. 2. Resolves these types to their physical FileObjects. 3. Performs a recursive physical walk of the source root. 4. Merges the results: for each file, it either adds the logical types discovered from the index or adds the file itself if no types were indexed (handles package-info.java and non-java files). 5. Post-processes the component map to establish nesting relationships.

      Parameters:
      project - The parent project.
      sg - The NetBeans source group instance.
      Throws:
      Exception - if index access or physical walk fails.

  • Method Details

    • walkJavaPackages

      private void walkJavaPackages(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject root, org.openide.filesystems.FileObject current, Map<org.openide.filesystems.FileObject, List<ProjectComponent>> fileToComponents, Map<String, JavaPackage> pkgMap) throws Exception
      Recursively walks the directory structure to identify Java packages and their contents.
      Parameters:
      root - The source root folder.
      current - The current folder being walked.
      fileToComponents - The mapping of file objects to logical components.
      pkgMap - The package accumulator map.
      Throws:
      Exception - if filesystem operations fail.

    • getTotalSize

      public long getTotalSize()
      Calculates the total recursive size of this node and all its descendants.

      Implementation details: This method must perform a deep traversal of the subtree rooted at this node, summing the sizes of all constituent physical files or logical components to provide an accurate total byte count for the branch.

      Implementation details: Calculates the total recursive size of all logical packages contained within this group.

      Specified by:
      getTotalSize in class ProjectNode
      Returns:
      The total size in bytes.

    • renderMarkdown

      public void renderMarkdown(StringBuilder sb, String indent, boolean summary)
      Renders the node and its children into a Markdown representation.

      Implementation details: The renderer must strictly honor the 'summary' flag. In summary mode, it should only output aggregate totals for the node. In standard mode, it must perform a hierarchical traversal, using indentation to represent nesting depth and specialized icons to denote node types.

      Implementation details: 1. Renders the source group header (display name and relative path). 2. Recursively triggers rendering for all constituent packages.

      Specified by:
      renderMarkdown in class ProjectNode
      Parameters:
      sb - The target StringBuilder to append the Markdown to.
      indent - The current indentation string (e.g., " ") for nesting level.
      summary - If true, renders only the condensed/aggregate view.
